info.name: Photo Global API
info.description:
Photographer API (user JWT auth).

## Setup
1. Import **Photo Global — Local** (`postman/Photo_Global.local.postman_environment.json`).
2. **Select that environment** in Postman (top-right). Required for `{{token}}` to work.
3. Start API: `npm start` → `http://127.0.0.1:7100`
4. AI gallery text: add `OPENAI_API_KEY` to `.env`, restart.
5. Client share links use `APP_URL` in `.env` (default `http://localhost:3000/{companySlug}/{gallerySlug}`).

## Token (important)
- Run **Auth → Register** or **Login** (or **Google sign in**).
- Tests save the JWT to **both** the environment and collection variable `token`.
- Protected routes send `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` (collection auth).
- If **Me** returns 401: re-run Login on the **same** `baseUrl` (local vs production use different `JWT_SECRET`).
- Use **Auth → Clear token** before switching users.

## Flow
Register/Login → **Onboarding** (sets `companySlug`) → Create client → **Galleries → Create gallery** (saves `{{galleryId}}`) → **Get gallery detail** → **Customize gallery** (design, client access, selection limit) → **Activate share link** → **Public Galleries** (no JWT; use **Unlock gallery** when password-protected).

**Public gallery access:** after **Unlock gallery**, `{{galleryAccessToken}}` is saved automatically and sent as `X-Gallery-Access-Token` on public routes (collection pre-request script).

Upload raw files: **Galleries → Uploads → Upload files** (`photos` field). Finals: **Galleries → Finals → Upload finals** (`finals` field). Both accept images and video.

## Upload limits (per file)
- **Images:** max **100MB** each
- **Videos:** max **1TB** each
- **Batch:** up to **700 files** per request

exec: * Postman resolves {{token}} from the active ENVIRONMENT before collection variables.
* Always save tokens to both scopes (see saveAuthToken).
'No token — run Auth → Register or Login (with Photo Global — Local environment selected).'

item.name: Auth
item.description: Public: Register, Login, Google, Forgot/Reset password. Each login-style response saves `token` to environment + collection. After **Register**, verify email via **Verify email** (OTP is logged as `[email-verification]` in dev). Protected: **Me**, **Verify email**, **Resend verification**.

request.description: Email/password accounts only. Google users must use **Google sign in**.
Requires `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` in API `.env` matching your OAuth client.
Always 200. Dev: check API terminal for `[password-reset]` URL.
`token` here is the **password-reset** token from the email/link, not the JWT.
Invalidates the current JWT on the server and clears `token` in Postman. Client should also remove stored credentials. (`POST /api/auth/logout` is an alias.)

exec: throw new Error('No token set. Run Register or Login first (with environment selected).');

request.description: Sends `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`. Fails fast in pre-request if token is empty.
Set `code` from API terminal `[email-verification]` log after Register.

exec: console.log('Token cleared from environment and collection.');

request.description: Clears `token` before switching users or re-login. Does not call the API.

item.name: Onboarding
item.description: Requires JWT (`{{token}}`). Run **Auth → Login** first. Use **Complete onboarding** once (all required fields + optional logo in one request).

exec: console.warn('Run Auth → Login then Me. Ensure Photo Global — Local environment is selected.');

formdata.description: Required — SMS display name (max 11 letters/numbers; pending carrier approval)
Optional PNG/JPG, max 5MB — leave empty or pick a file

request.description: Single `POST /api/onboarding` with all required fields in one multipart request. Logo is optional — include the `logo` file only when you have one. Uses Bearer `{{token}}`.
Partial update — send only fields you want to change. Same multipart shape as **Complete onboarding**.

item.name: SMS
item.description: Studio SMS identity (Arkesel). Requires JWT. Approve sender IDs via Admin routes before branded sends use the studio name.

item.name: Email
item.description: Photographer email notifications (Resend). Requires JWT.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Platform admin JWT (`adminToken`). Run **Admin login** first.

item.name: Settings
item.description: Profile settings screen — profile card, overview stats, studio details, logo, and account info. Requires JWT (`{{token}}`).

formdata.description: Optional profile photo PNG/JPG, max 1.2 MB

request.description: Save profile settings. Send only fields you want to change. Use clearLogo=true or clearAvatar=true to remove images.

item.name: Watermark
item.description: Watermark logo on client downloads — toggle, logo upload, trim box, and portrait/landscape placement.

formdata.description: Optional watermark logo PNG/JPG (transparent PNG recommended)

request.description: Save watermark settings. Send only fields you want to change. Use clearLogo=true to remove the watermark logo.

item.name: Gallery defaults
item.description: Default gallery cover and watermark preview thumbnails for new galleries.

request.description: Toggle only — use when the switch changes in the UI.

formdata.description: Wide JPG/PNG/WebP (1600×900+ recommended). Field name cover or defaultCover.

request.description: Upload cover only — does not change the watermark preview toggle.

formdata.description: Text watermark on client selection thumbnails
Optional default cover — wide JPG/PNG/WebP (1600×900+ recommended)

request.description: Save toggle and cover together. Use clearCover=true to remove the default cover.

item.name: Help & support
item.description: Report an issue — submit topic, description, and optional screenshots/files directly to the API.

formdata.value: I tried to upload photos to a gallery but the upload failed with no error message. I expected the files to appear in the gallery.

formdata.description: Optional screenshot or file (PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, PDF). Up to 5 files.

request.description: Submit directly — no email client required. Also accepts JSON without attachments.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Home dashboard data in one request: summary stats, storage breakdown, weekly activity chart, recent activity feed, and recent galleries.

exec: pm.test('Stats include clients, galleries, inProgress, completed', () => {

request.description:
Returns dashboard widgets in one payload:
- `stats` — clients, galleries, inProgress (draft + selecting), completed (done)
- `storage` — used/limit bytes, plan %, breakdown (raws/selections/finals), RAW focus
- `weeklyActivity` — today, thisWeek, trend, on_track status, 7-day chart series
- `recentActivity` — gallery feed with action labels (Updated, Proofing, Delivered)
- `recentGalleries` — gallery cards with cover thumbnails
- `user` — photographer profile summary

item.name: Billing
item.description: Paystack subscription plans. Set PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY and plan codes in .env. Checkout returns authorizationUrl — open in browser to pay. Webhook: POST /api/billing/webhook.

exec: console.log('Open authorizationUrl in browser to complete payment');

request.description: planId: starter | pro | studio. Returns checkout.authorizationUrl — redirect user there to pay with Paystack.
Optional fallback if webhook is delayed (local dev). Replace reference with Paystack transaction reference.
Cancels Paystack subscription and downgrades account to Free plan.

item.name: Galleries
item.description:
Requires JWT and `clientId`. Share URL: `{{companySlug}}/{{gallerySlug}}` (activate share link first).

**Customize gallery:** cover focal, design (cover style / grid / fonts), client access (password, downloads), selection limit, background music.

**Uploads tab:** `POST .../uploads` — field `photos` (images + video).
**Finals tab:** `POST .../finals` — field `finals` (images + video).

**Per-file limits:** images max **100MB**, videos max **1TB**. **Batch:** up to **700 files** per request.

request.description: Hero metadata, stats, shareUrl, design, clientAccess, music, focal point.
Engagement metrics: link views, client downloads, selection rate, 7-day activity, media breakdown. Views/downloads are recorded when clients open the share link or download finals.
Shoot/event types for the edit-gallery form (`galleryTypes`) plus customize-gallery design options (`design.coverStyles`, `design.gridStyles`, `design.generalColors`, `design.typography`).
Edit gallery form: event name, date, description, gallery type, and URL slug. Slug must be unique per studio and lowercase with hyphens.
Removes custom cover file and uses studio default.
Sets status to `done`. Returns 400 if already completed.

item.name: Customize gallery
item.description:
Client link presentation and access — matches the **Customize gallery** sidebar in the app.

**Design options:** `GET /api/galleries/meta` → `design.coverStyles`, `design.gridStyles`, `design.generalColors`, `design.typography`.

**Cover styles:** cinematic, collage, minimal, bento, overlay, card_based, parallax, hero_carousel, full_bleed, editorial_card, film_border, split_feature.

**Grid styles:** uniform, masonry, bento, split, horizontal_scroll, collage, adaptive.

**General colors:** preset keys (charcoal, ink, forest, wine, navy, clay, stone, cream) or hex `#rrggbb`.

**Typography:** title fonts — Playfair Display, Cormorant Garamond, Libre Baskerville, DM Serif Display; body fonts — Inter, DM Sans, Source Sans 3, Nunito Sans.

request.description: Drag focal point for cover crop (0–100%).

formdata.description: MP3, M4A, WAV, AAC, or OGG — max 20MB

request.description: Upload audio first. Clients hear it on the share gallery when enabled.
Set heart-pick limit (`null` = unlimited), lock client edits, and toggle finals tab.

Cover style, general color, grid layout, and typography for the client link. `generalColor` and legacy `backdropColor` are both accepted. Saved fields appear on `GET /api/public/...` as `gallery.design`.
Password protection and download toggle for the public gallery. Use the same password in **Public Galleries → Unlock gallery**.
Regenerates token + expiry. Share URL: `http://localhost:3000/{{companySlug}}/{{gallerySlug}}`

item.name: Uploads
item.description:
Raw files tab — images and video (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, MP4, MOV, WebM, etc.). Multipart field: `photos`.

**Limits:** each image max **100MB**, each video max **1TB**. Up to **700 files** in one batch.

request.description: Upload raw tab — **Add preview watermark**. Persists per gallery; new raw uploads use this when watermark processing runs. Studio default: **Settings → Gallery defaults → Toggle watermark preview**.

formdata.description: One or more files — each image max 100MB, each video max 1TB (up to 700 files per request)

request.description: Multipart upload. **Per file:** images max 100MB, videos max 1TB. **Batch:** up to 700 files. Optional `onConflict`: skip | replace | cancel.
30-day restore window.
Or `{ "all": true }` to trash every upload.

Dashboard drag-reorder. Send the **full** gallery-wide ordered list of active upload ids (not just the visible set). Backend sets `sortOrder` = array index. Client share URL returns `photos[]` in this order.

item.name: Selections
item.description: Client heart-picks from the share gallery. Each photo includes a `thread` / `comments` array for chat-style feedback.

request.description: Photographer response on a client-selected original. Appends to the photo `thread`.

item.name: Finals
item.description:
Delivery tab — images and video. Multipart field: `finals`.

**Limits:** each image max **100MB**, each video max **1TB**. Up to **700 files** in one batch.

request.description: Final images tab — **Add watermark for final images**. Applies brand logo from **Settings → Watermark** to new final uploads when processing runs. Studio default: watermark `enabled` flag.

formdata.description: One or more files — each image max 100MB, each video max 1TB (up to 700 files per request)

request.description: Multipart upload. **Per file:** images max 100MB, videos max 1TB. **Batch:** up to 700 files.

formdata.description: One or more files — each image max 100MB, each video max 1TB (up to 700 files per request)

request.description: Same upload limits as paid finals: images max 100MB each, videos max 1TB each, up to 700 files per batch. Previews locked until client pays.
Client-flagged delivered edits with feedback threads.
Photographer response on a flagged final. Appends to the final `thread`.
Lock a final until payment. Accepts `amountOwing`, `outstandingBalanceGhs`, `outstanding_balance_ghs`, or `balance` (GHS). Sets `clientPaid` to false.
Unlock a final for client download. Clears amount owing and marks `clientPaid` true.
Or `{ "finalIds": ["{{finalId}}"] }`.
Dashboard drag-reorder. Send the **full** gallery-wide ordered list of active final ids. Backend sets `sortOrder` = array index. Client share URL returns `finals[]` in this order.

item.name: Trash
item.description: Unified trash view (galleries + files). Items stay for 30 days before automatic permanent deletion. Use **Empty trash** to delete everything immediately.

item.name: Public Galleries
item.description:
No JWT — client-facing share gallery.

**Setup:** Onboarding → Activate share link → (optional) **Customize gallery → Update client access** with password.

**Password flow:** `GET` returns **401** when locked (no preview payload) → **Unlock gallery** returns the **same full payload** as an unlocked `GET`, plus `accessToken` → token auto-attached via `X-Gallery-Access-Token` (collection pre-request).

**Response highlights:** `gallery.design` (cover/grid/fonts), `selectionLimit` / `selectionsRemaining`, `thread` on photos & finals for chat UI.

request.description: Full payload when unlocked (or no password). Locked galleries return **401** with `accessRequired` / `passwordRequired` only — use **Unlock gallery** for the full payload.
Returns the same full gallery payload as **View client gallery**, plus `accessToken` when the password is correct.
Toggles heart-pick. Respects `selectionLimit`. Blocked when `selectionLocked`. Optional comment appends to `thread`.
Appends a client message to the selection `thread`. Blocked when `selectionLocked`.
Client submits heart-picks. Can be called again unless `selectionLocked`.
One-way flag on a delivered final. Requires comment. Returns 409 if already flagged.
Appends another client message to a flagged final's `thread`.
Streams an unlocked final. Returns 403 when final is payment-locked, `allowDownloads` is false, or gallery password not unlocked.

item.name: By share token
item.description: Same actions under `/api/public/token/{{shareToken}}/...` (token saved by **Activate share link**).

item.name: Bookings
item.description: Requires JWT + a `clientId` from **Clients → Create client**.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Consultation & planning",
  "clientId": "{{clientId}}",
  "date": "2026-05-20",
  "shootType": "Wedding",
  "amountCharged": 2500,
  "currency": "GHS",
  "start": "10:00 AM",
  "end": "12:00 PM",
  "location": "Studio",
  "notes": "Optional notes for this booking"
}

item.name: Income
item.description: Requires JWT + a `clientId` from **Clients → Create client**. Optional `bookingId` from **Bookings → Create booking**.
